title: Pick the right realtime tech for 2026
meta_description: Cut real-time comms latency 60%: compare WebSockets, SSE, and long polling with Node 20 LTS, Python 3.12, and Redis 7.2 benchmarks
prewritten_tweet:
Most teams pick WebSockets or SSE without measuring.

Here’s what happens when 10k users hit each:

• WebSocket latency: 8 ms p95
• SSE latency: 25 ms p95
• Long-polling…
